# About On-Demand Usage

On-demand usage grants immediate access to additional licenses at the moment they're needed.
By default, Trimble Viewpoint grants the flexibility of on-demand usage to cloud-deployed organizations.This arrangement provides the option to access software user licenses beyond whatever count is stipulated in your contract, thereby simplifying your effort to support cyclical, short-term peak use or seasonal fluctuations in license demand.
Spectrum provides a number of resources to reveal your organization's license usage trends to help you determine whether your licensing count is right for your organization, and to make adjustments that work for you.
To learn more about these resources, see

- [About On-Demand Usage in a Named User License (NUL) model](https://trimble.deploy.heretto.com/v4/deployments/mVyHSMAo9PbkfqcxUBWF/object/3dc810b0-ec3b-11ec-bbc8-0242c0252b0d?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..7Gobr2wLJBZ6x9Mk_rMhHYjk8mwmLzZ0WoXIvAinzp8&response-content-disposition=filename%3D%22TC1_On_Demand_Usage_NAMED.pdf%22)

- [About On-Demand Usage in a Concurrent
 User License (CUL) model](https://trimble.deploy.heretto.com/v4/deployments/mVyHSMAo9PbkfqcxUBWF/object/3e74f280-ec3b-11ec-bbc8-0242c0252b0d?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..QQ7jtuHrspfDayIrBgCeTwpgMGMODTtf03a3JMpjOac&response-content-disposition=filename%3D%22TC1_On_Demand_Usage_CONCURRENT.pdf%22)
